name: oi_change_persistence
description: OI 变化方向持续性：连续同向 OI 变化次数乘以方向
code:
def oi_change_persistence(df):
    oi_change = df["open_interest"].diff()
    oi_direction = np.sign(oi_change)
    persistence = oi_direction.rolling(10).apply(lambda x: (x == x.iloc[-1]).sum() * x.iloc[-1], raw=False)
    result = pd.Series(index=df.index, data=persistence)
    result = (result - result.rolling(60).mean()) / (result.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    return result

name: price_oi_divergence_intensity
description: 价格-OI 背离强度：价格与 OI 动量 z 差的绝对值取反
code:
def price_oi_divergence_intensity(df):
    price_ret = df["close"].pct_change(10)
    price_z = (price_ret - price_ret.rolling(60).mean()) / (price_ret.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    oi_ret = df["open_interest"].pct_change(10)
    oi_z = (oi_ret - oi_ret.rolling(60).mean()) / (oi_ret.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    divergence = np.abs(price_z - oi_z)
    divergence = (divergence - divergence.rolling(60).mean()) / (divergence.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    return divergence * -1

name: vol_weighted_price_mom
description: 成交量加权价格动量：收益率乘以相对成交量后标准化
code:
def vol_weighted_price_mom(df):
    ret = df["close"].pct_change(5)
    vol_ratio = df["volume"] / df["volume"].rolling(20).mean()
    weighted_mom = ret * vol_ratio
    signal = (weighted_mom - weighted_mom.rolling(40).mean()) / (weighted_mom.rolling(40).std() + 1e-8)
    return signal

name: oi_rsi_strength
description: OI 相对强度：基于 OI 变化的 RSI 类指标
code:
def oi_rsi_strength(df):
    oi_change = df["open_interest"].diff()
    gain = oi_change.clip(lower=0)
    loss = (-oi_change).clip(lower=0)
    avg_gain = gain.rolling(14).mean()
    avg_loss = loss.rolling(14).mean()
    rs = avg_gain / (avg_loss + 1e-8)
    rsi = 100 - (100 / (1 + rs))
    rsi_centered = rsi - 50
    signal = (rsi_centered - rsi_centered.rolling(60).mean()) / (rsi_centered.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    return signal

name: high_low_position_mom
description: 高低点位置动量：收盘价在 20 期高低区间位置的变化
code:
def high_low_position_mom(df):
    highest = df["high"].rolling(20).max()
    lowest = df["low"].rolling(20).min()
    position = (df["close"] - lowest) / (highest - lowest + 1e-8)
    mom = position.diff(5)
    signal = (mom - mom.rolling(40).mean()) / (mom.rolling(40).std() + 1e-8)
    return signal

name: volume_spike_reversal
description: 成交量突增后反转：放量后 10 期收益累积的反转信号
code:
def volume_spike_reversal(df):
    vol_z = (df["volume"] - df["volume"].rolling(40).mean()) / (df["volume"].rolling(40).std() + 1e-8)
    spike = (vol_z > 1.5).astype(float)
    ret = df["close"].pct_change()
    spike_ret = spike * ret
    cumulative = spike_ret.rolling(10).sum()
    signal = (cumulative - cumulative.rolling(60).mean()) / (cumulative.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    return signal * -1

name: oi_vol_adj_momentum
description: OI 波动率调整动量：OI 动量除以其波动率
code:
def oi_vol_adj_momentum(df):
    oi_mom = df["open_interest"].pct_change(10)
    oi_vol = oi_mom.rolling(20).std()
    adj_mom = oi_mom / (oi_vol + 1e-8)
    signal = (adj_mom - adj_mom.rolling(60).mean()) / (adj_mom.rolling(60).std() + 1e-8)
    return signal

name: zscore_vwap_deviation
description: 计算收盘价相对于成交量加权均价(VWAP)的滚动Z-score偏离度，捕捉价格偏离量价均衡位置后的均值回归机会
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    typical_price = (df['high'] + df['low'] + df['close']) / 3.0
    vwap = (typical_price * df['volume']).rolling(20, min_periods=10).sum() / df['volume'].rolling(20, min_periods=10).sum()
    deviation = df['close'] - vwap
    dev_mean = deviation.rolling(40, min_periods=20).mean()
    dev_std = deviation.rolling(40, min_periods=20).std(ddof=1)
    zscore = (deviation - dev_mean) / dev_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = -zscore
    return factor

name: shadow_body_momentum
description: 计算上下影线长度比与实体方向的交互动量，捕捉K线微观博弈中多空力量的边际变化——长上影暗示抛压、长下影暗示承接，结合实体方向可识别反转或延续信号
source: 微观结构因子（K线形态、影线分析）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    body = df['close'] - df['open']
    body_len = body.abs()
    upper_shadow = df['high'] - df[['open', 'close']].max(axis=1)
    lower_shadow = df[['open', 'close']].min(axis=1) - df['low']
    total_range = df['high'] - df['low']
    total_range = total_range.replace(0, np.nan)
    shadow_imbalance = (lower_shadow - upper_shadow) / total_range
    body_dir = np.sign(body)
    raw = shadow_imbalance * body_dir * (1 - body_len / total_range)
    factor_series = raw.rolling(window=6, min_periods=3).mean()
    factor_series.name = 'shadow_body_momentum'
    return factor_series

name: realized_vol_term_structure_slope
description: 计算短期(5根)与长期(20根)已实现波动率的斜率差，捕捉波动率期限结构的陡峭程度变化，当短期波动率急剧高于长期时预示市场进入高波动regime，反之则趋于平静。
source: 波动率结构因子（波动率锥、波动率偏斜、Realized Vol）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    log_ret = np.log(df['close'] / df['close'].shift(1))
    rv_short = log_ret.rolling(5).std() * np.sqrt(5)
    rv_mid = log_ret.rolling(10).std() * np.sqrt(10)
    rv_long = log_ret.rolling(20).std() * np.sqrt(20)
    slope_short = rv_short - rv_long
    slope_mid = rv_mid - rv_long
    curvature = slope_short - slope_mid
    rv_long_safe = rv_long.replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = curvature / rv_long_safe
    factor.name = 'realized_vol_term_structure_slope'
    return factor

name: oi_velocity_curve
description: 计算持仓量变化速度的曲率（二阶导数与一阶导数的比值），捕捉OI增减速拐点，拐点处往往对应主力建仓/平仓节奏的切换，领先于价格反转。
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    oi = df['open_interest']
    oi_d1 = oi.diff()
    oi_d2 = oi_d1.diff()
    oi_d1_abs = oi_d1.abs().rolling(10).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    curvature = oi_d2 / oi_d1_abs
    factor = curvature.rolling(5).mean() / curvature.rolling(20).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor.name = 'oi_velocity_curve'
    return factor

name: realized_vol_cone_percentile
description: 计算多周期已实现波动率在其历史波动率锥中的分位数位置，捕捉当前波动率处于历史结构中的相对高低状态，低分位意味着波动率压缩（蓄势），高分位意味着波动率扩张（趋势延续或反转）
source: 波动率结构因子（波动率锥、波动率偏斜、Realized Vol）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    log_ret = np.log(df['close'] / df['close'].shift(1))
    rv_short = log_ret.rolling(8).std()
    rv_mid = log_ret.rolling(24).std()
    rv_long = log_ret.rolling(60).std()
    def rolling_percentile(s, lookback=120):
        out = pd.Series(np.nan, index=s.index)
        arr = s.values
        for i in range(lookback, len(arr)):
            window = arr[i - lookback:i]
            valid = window[~np.isnan(window)]
            if len(valid) < 20:
                continue
            out.iloc[i] = np.searchsorted(np.sort(valid), arr[i]) / len(valid)
        return out
    pct_short = rolling_percentile(rv_short, 120)
    pct_mid = rolling_percentile(rv_mid, 120)
    pct_long = rolling_percentile(rv_long, 120)
    skew_short_long = pct_short - pct_long
    factor = 0.5 * skew_short_long + 0.3 * pct_short + 0.2 * (pct_short - pct_mid)
    factor.name = 'realized_vol_cone_percentile'
    return factor

name: shadow_imbalance_momentum
description: 计算上下影线不对称性的滚动动量，捕捉多空试探力量的持续性偏移——连续上影线偏长暗示抛压积聚，连续下影线偏长暗示买盘承接，该动量反映微观结构中多空博弈的趋势性变化。
source: 微观结构因子（K线形态、影线分析）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    body_high = np.maximum(df['open'], df['close'])
    body_low = np.minimum(df['open'], df['close'])
    upper_shadow = df['high'] - body_high
    lower_shadow = body_low - df['low']
    total_shadow = upper_shadow + lower_shadow
    shadow_imbal = (lower_shadow - upper_shadow) / total_shadow.replace(0, np.nan)
    shadow_imbal = shadow_imbal.fillna(0.0)
    fast_ma = shadow_imbal.rolling(window=5, min_periods=3).mean()
    slow_ma = shadow_imbal.rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).mean()
    factor = fast_ma - slow_ma
    return factor

name: long_cycle_trend_projection
description: 将长周期（日线级别，16根30分钟K线）的趋势强度通过线性回归斜率映射到短周期，捕捉大级别趋势对当前K线的方向性压力
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close']
    long_window = 16
    short_window = 4
    # 长周期线性回归斜率（标准化）
    def rolling_slope(series, window):
        x = np.arange(window, dtype=float)
        x_mean = x.mean()
        x_var = ((x - x_mean) ** 2).sum()
        slopes = series.rolling(window).apply(
            lambda y: ((x - x_mean) * (y - y.mean())).sum() / x_var if x_var > 0 else 0.0,
            raw=True
        )
        return slopes
    long_slope = rolling_slope(close, long_window)
    long_slope_norm = long_slope / close.rolling(long_window).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    # 短周期收益率均值作为短周期动量
    short_ret = close.pct_change()
    short_mom = short_ret.rolling(short_window).mean()
    short_mom_norm = short_mom / short_ret.rolling(long_window).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    # 长周期趋势与短周期动量的交互：趋势一致时放大，背离时抑制
    factor = long_slope_norm * 0.7 + short_mom_norm * 0.3
    factor.name = 'long_cycle_trend_projection'
    return factor

name: intraday_session_momentum_bias
description: 捕捉黄金期货日内不同交易时段（早盘/午盘/夜盘）的动量偏差，利用特定时段收益率相对全天均值的系统性偏离作为预测信号，反映机构与散户在不同时段的行为差异。
source: 季节性因子（月份效应、周内效应、时段效应）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    df = df.copy()
    df['ret'] = df['close'].pct_change()
    df['bar_index'] = np.arange(len(df))
    bars_per_day = 8
    df['intraday_pos'] = df['bar_index'] % bars_per_day
    df['session'] = pd.cut(df['intraday_pos'], bins=[-1, 2, 5, 7], labels=[0, 1, 2]).astype(int)
    roll_window = bars_per_day * 20
    roll_mean = df['ret'].rolling(roll_window, min_periods=bars_per_day * 5).mean()
    session_dev = df['ret'] - roll_mean
    session_weighted = session_dev.copy()
    for s in [0, 1, 2]:
        mask = df['session'] == s
        s_roll = session_dev.where(mask).rolling(roll_window, min_periods=10).mean()
        session_weighted = session_weighted.where(~mask, other=s_roll)
    vol_scale = df['ret'].rolling(roll_window, min_periods=bars_per_day * 5).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = session_weighted / vol_scale
    factor.name = 'intraday_session_momentum_bias'
    return factor

name: vwap_deviation_zscore
description: 计算价格偏离成交量加权均价(VWAP)的Z-Score，捕捉价格相对于真实交易重心的超买超卖程度，偏离越大回归动力越强
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    typical_price = (df['high'] + df['low'] + df['close']) / 3.0
    vwap = (typical_price * df['volume']).rolling(48).sum() / df['volume'].rolling(48).sum()
    deviation = df['close'] - vwap
    dev_mean = deviation.rolling(96).mean()
    dev_std = deviation.rolling(96).std(ddof=0)
    zscore = (deviation - dev_mean) / dev_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = -zscore
    return factor

name: oi_price_divergence_tension
description: 衡量持仓量变化方向与价格变化方向的持续背离张力——当OI累计变动与价格累计变动长期反向时，积累的"弹簧势能"越大，预示均值回归或趋势加速的概率越高。
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close']
    oi = df['open_interest']
    window = 20
    short_w = 5
    oi_chg = oi.diff().fillna(0)
    price_chg = close.diff().fillna(0)
    oi_cum = oi_chg.rolling(window).sum()
    price_cum = price_chg.rolling(window).sum()
    oi_std = oi_chg.rolling(window).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    price_std = price_chg.rolling(window).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    oi_z = oi_cum / oi_std
    price_z = price_cum / price_std
    divergence = oi_z * price_z
    tension = -divergence
    recent_oi_dir = np.sign(oi_chg.rolling(short_w).sum())
    recent_price_dir = np.sign(price_chg.rolling(short_w).sum())
    confirm = (recent_oi_dir != recent_price_dir).astype(float)
    factor = tension * (0.6 + 0.4 * confirm)
    factor.name = 'oi_price_divergence_tension'
    return factor

name: session_hour_momentum_bias
description: 利用黄金期货不同交易时段（夜盘/早盘/午盘）的动量特征差异，捕捉时段效应带来的收益偏移，夜盘往往受外盘驱动波动更大，早盘开盘后存在均值回复倾向
source: 季节性因子（月份效应、周内效应、时段效应）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    df = df.copy()
    df['ret'] = df['close'].pct_change()
    df['hour'] = df.index.hour if isinstance(df.index, pd.DatetimeIndex) else pd.to_datetime(df['datetime']).dt.hour if 'datetime' in df.columns else pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    # 夜盘: 21-23, 0-2; 早盘: 9-11; 午盘: 13-15
    night = df['hour'].isin([21, 22, 23, 0, 1, 2])
    morning = df['hour'].isin([9, 10, 11])
    afternoon = df['hour'].isin([13, 14, 15])
    df['session'] = np.where(night, 0, np.where(morning, 1, np.where(afternoon, 2, -1)))
    window = 40
    night_ret = df['ret'].where(df['session'] == 0, 0.0)
    morning_ret = df['ret'].where(df['session'] == 1, 0.0)
    afternoon_ret = df['ret'].where(df['session'] == 2, 0.0)
    night_mean = night_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=10).mean()
    morning_mean = morning_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=10).mean()
    afternoon_mean = afternoon_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=10).mean()
    night_std = night_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=10).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    morning_std = morning_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=10).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    current_session = df['session']
    factor = pd.Series(np.nan, index=df.index)
    is_night = current_session == 0
    is_morning = current_session == 1
    is_afternoon = current_session == 2
    factor[is_night] = (night_mean[is_night] / night_std[is_night])
    factor[is_morning] = -(morning_mean[is_morning] / morning_std[is_morning])
    factor[is_afternoon] = (afternoon_mean[is_afternoon] - morning_mean[is_afternoon])
    factor = factor.fillna(method='ffill').fillna(0)
    factor.name = 'session_hour_momentum_bias'
    return factor

name: multi_horizon_trend_projection
description: 将长周期（240根K线，约5个交易日）的线性回归斜率投影到短周期（30根K线），用短周期价格对长周期趋势线的偏离度衡量均值回归压力，偏离越大代表短周期过度偏离长期趋势，存在回归动力。
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close'].values
    n_long = 240
    n_short = 30
    factor = np.full(len(close), np.nan)
    for i in range(n_long - 1, len(close)):
        y_long = close[i - n_long + 1: i + 1]
        x_long = np.arange(n_long, dtype=np.float64)
        x_mean = x_long.mean()
        y_mean = y_long.mean()
        slope = np.sum((x_long - x_mean) * (y_long - y_mean)) / (np.sum((x_long - x_mean) ** 2) + 1e-12)
        intercept = y_mean - slope * x_mean
        projected_value = intercept + slope * (n_long - 1)
        actual = close[i]
        std_start = max(0, i - n_short + 1)
        rolling_std = np.std(close[std_start: i + 1], ddof=1) if (i - std_start + 1) > 1 else 1e-12
        deviation = (actual - projected_value) / (rolling_std + 1e-12)
        factor[i] = -deviation
    return pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='multi_horizon_trend_projection')

name: volume_price_divergence_momentum
description: 衡量成交量变化率与价格变化率的背离程度的动量，当量增价滞或量缩价涨时产生极端信号，捕捉量价背离后的反转机会
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']
    ret = close.pct_change()
    vol_ret = volume.pct_change()
    vol_ret_z = (vol_ret - vol_ret.rolling(20).mean()) / (vol_ret.rolling(20).std() + 1e-9)
    price_ret_z = (ret - ret.rolling(20).mean()) / (ret.rolling(20).std() + 1e-9)
    divergence = vol_ret_z - price_ret_z.abs() * np.sign(ret)
    div_ma_fast = divergence.rolling(5).mean()
    div_ma_slow = divergence.rolling(15).mean()
    factor = div_ma_fast - div_ma_slow
    return factor

name: vwap_mean_reversion_zscore
description: 计算收盘价相对于成交量加权均价(VWAP)的滚动Z-Score偏离度，捕捉价格偏离量价均衡位置后的均值回归倾向，偏离越大回归动力越强
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    typical_price = (df['high'] + df['low'] + df['close']) / 3.0
    cum_tp_vol = (typical_price * df['volume']).rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).sum()
    cum_vol = df['volume'].rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).sum()
    vwap = cum_tp_vol / cum_vol.replace(0, np.nan)
    deviation = df['close'] - vwap
    dev_mean = deviation.rolling(window=40, min_periods=20).mean()
    dev_std = deviation.rolling(window=40, min_periods=20).std()
    zscore = (deviation - dev_mean) / dev_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    factor_series = -zscore
    factor_series.name = 'vwap_mean_reversion_zscore'
    return factor_series

name: volume_price_divergence_intensity
description: 衡量成交量变化率与价格变化率之间的背离强度，当量增价滞或量缩价涨时产生极端值，捕捉量价背离带来的趋势反转信号
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']
    ret = close.pct_change()
    vol_chg = volume.pct_change()
    vol_chg_norm = (vol_chg - vol_chg.rolling(20).mean()) / vol_chg.rolling(20).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    ret_norm = (ret - ret.rolling(20).mean()) / ret.rolling(20).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    raw_div = vol_chg_norm - ret_norm.abs() * np.sign(ret_norm)
    factor = raw_div.rolling(6).mean() / raw_div.rolling(20).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor.name = 'volume_price_divergence_intensity'
    return factor

name: smart_money_absorption_ratio
description: 通过比较持仓量增加但价格波动收窄的区间，识别主力资金在窄幅震荡中悄然吸筹或派发的行为，吸筹比率越高说明主力控盘意图越强
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    oi = df['open_interest']
    high = df['high']
    low = df['low']
    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']
    oi_chg = oi.diff()
    price_range = high - low
    avg_range = price_range.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean()
    range_ratio = price_range / avg_range.replace(0, np.nan)
    narrow_range = (range_ratio < 0.7).astype(float)
    oi_increase = (oi_chg > 0).astype(float)
    absorption_event = narrow_range * oi_increase
    vol_weight = volume / volume.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    weighted_absorption = absorption_event * vol_weight * oi_chg.abs() / oi.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    price_dir = np.sign(close.diff())
    signed_absorption = weighted_absorption * price_dir
    factor = signed_absorption.rolling(12, min_periods=3).sum() - signed_absorption.rolling(30, min_periods=8).sum() * (12.0 / 30.0)
    return factor

name: shadow_absorption_ratio
description: 计算上下影线被后续K线实体"吸收"的程度，衡量市场对极端价格的接受度——若影线区域被下一根K线实体覆盖，说明市场认可该价格区间，反之则为虚假突破信号
source: 微观结构因子（K线形态、影线分析）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    body_top = np.maximum(df['open'], df['close'])
    body_bot = np.minimum(df['open'], df['close'])
    upper_shadow = df['high'] - body_top
    lower_shadow = body_bot - df['low']
    total_shadow = upper_shadow + lower_shadow
    next_body_top = body_top.shift(-1)
    next_body_bot = body_bot.shift(-1)
    upper_absorbed = np.maximum(0, np.minimum(df['high'], next_body_top) - np.maximum(body_top, next_body_bot))
    lower_absorbed = np.maximum(0, np.minimum(body_bot, next_body_top) - np.maximum(df['low'], next_body_bot))
    absorbed = upper_absorbed + lower_absorbed
    raw_ratio = np.where(total_shadow > 1e-9, absorbed / total_shadow, 0.0)
    raw_ratio = pd.Series(raw_ratio, index=df.index)
    direction = np.sign(df['close'] - df['open'])
    signed_ratio = raw_ratio * direction
    factor = signed_ratio.rolling(window=8, min_periods=4).mean() - signed_ratio.rolling(window=24, min_periods=12).mean()
    return factor

name: oi_weighted_mean_reversion_z
description: 用持仓量加权的价格偏离其自适应均线的Z-score，持仓量越大时偏离越可信，捕捉超买超卖后的均值回归机会
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close']
    oi = df['open_interest']
    window = 20
    oi_w = oi / oi.rolling(window, min_periods=1).sum()
    oi_w = oi_w.fillna(1.0 / window)
    weighted_ma = (close * oi_w).rolling(window, min_periods=5).sum() / oi_w.rolling(window, min_periods=5).sum()
    deviation = close - weighted_ma
    dev_std = deviation.rolling(window, min_periods=5).std()
    z = deviation / dev_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = -z
    factor.name = 'oi_weighted_mean_reversion_z'
    return factor

name: multi_cycle_trend_pressure
description: 将长周期（120根K线，约5个交易日）的EMA趋势方向与强度映射到当前30分钟K线，通过计算短周期收益率与长周期趋势的一致性得分来衡量跨周期趋势压力，一致时为正向压力，背离时为负向压力。
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close']
    oi = df['open_interest']
    long_period = 120
    short_period = 10
    ema_long = close.ewm(span=long_period, adjust=False).mean()
    long_trend = (close - ema_long) / ema_long
    short_ret = close.pct_change(short_period)
    oi_chg = oi.pct_change(long_period)
    trend_sign = np.sign(long_trend)
    short_sign = np.sign(short_ret)
    consistency = (trend_sign * short_ret).rolling(short_period).mean()
    oi_confirm = np.sign(oi_chg) * trend_sign
    oi_weight = 1 + 0.5 * oi_confirm
    factor = consistency * oi_weight * long_trend.abs()
    factor.name = 'multi_cycle_trend_pressure'
    return factor

name: multi_cycle_trend_projection
description: 将长周期（4小时/8根K线）的线性回归斜率映射到短周期（30分钟），捕捉长周期趋势对短周期价格的牵引力，当短周期价格偏离长周期趋势方向时产生回归信号
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']

    long_window = 8
    short_window = 3

    x = np.arange(long_window, dtype=float)
    x_mean = x.mean()
    x_demean = x - x_mean
    x_var = (x_demean ** 2).sum()

    long_slope = close.rolling(long_window).apply(
        lambda y: np.sum((x_demean) * (y - y.mean())) / x_var, raw=True
    )

    long_slope_norm = long_slope / close.rolling(long_window).mean()

    short_ret = close.pct_change(short_window)

    divergence = long_slope_norm - short_ret

    vol_ratio = volume.rolling(short_window).mean() / volume.rolling(long_window).mean()

    factor = divergence * vol_ratio

    return factor

name: smart_money_absorption
description: 通过检测价格波动收窄但持仓量持续增加的背离现象，捕捉主力资金在窄幅震荡中悄然吸筹或派发的行为，吸筹强度越高因子值越大
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    price_range = (df['high'] - df['low']) / df['close']
    oi_change = df['open_interest'].diff()
    range_ma = price_range.rolling(12).mean()
    range_std = price_range.rolling(12).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    range_zscore = (price_range - range_ma) / range_std
    oi_chg_ma = oi_change.rolling(12).mean()
    oi_chg_std = oi_change.rolling(12).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    oi_zscore = (oi_change - oi_chg_ma) / oi_chg_std
    raw = oi_zscore - range_zscore
    vol_ratio = df['volume'] / df['volume'].rolling(12).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    weight = 1.0 / (1.0 + np.exp(-2 * (vol_ratio - 1)))
    factor = (raw * weight).rolling(6).mean()
    return factor

name: oi_price_divergence_intensity
description: 衡量持仓量变化方向与价格变化方向的背离强度，通过滚动窗口内OI变化率与收益率的标准化差值累积来捕捉多空分歧加剧的信号
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    oi = df['open_interest']
    close = df['close']
    oi_ret = oi.pct_change().fillna(0)
    price_ret = close.pct_change().fillna(0)
    window = 12
    oi_z = (oi_ret - oi_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=1).mean()) / (oi_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=1).std().replace(0, np.nan)).fillna(1)
    price_z = (price_ret - price_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=1).mean()) / (price_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=1).std().replace(0, np.nan)).fillna(1)
    raw_div = oi_z - price_z * np.sign(oi_z)
    factor = raw_div.rolling(6, min_periods=1).sum()
    factor.name = 'oi_price_divergence_intensity'
    return factor

name: smart_money_divergence
description: 通过比较大成交量K线（主力活跃）与小成交量K线（散户主导）的持仓变动方向差异，捕捉主力资金的真实意图——当主力放量时持仓增减方向与散户时段相反，说明主力在反向布局
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    n = 20
    vol_ma = df['volume'].rolling(n).mean()
    vol_std = df['volume'].rolling(n).std()
    oi_change = df['open_interest'].diff()
    price_dir = np.sign(df['close'] - df['open'])
    signed_oi = oi_change * price_dir
    high_vol_mask = df['volume'] > (vol_ma + 0.8 * vol_std)
    low_vol_mask = df['volume'] < (vol_ma - 0.3 * vol_std)
    signed_oi_high = signed_oi.where(high_vol_mask, np.nan)
    signed_oi_low = signed_oi.where(low_vol_mask, np.nan)
    smart_flow = signed_oi_high.rolling(n, min_periods=3).mean()
    retail_flow = signed_oi_low.rolling(n, min_periods=3).mean()
    divergence = smart_flow - retail_flow
    factor = divergence / df['open_interest'].rolling(n).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor.name = 'smart_money_divergence'
    return factor

name: oi_weighted_mean_revert_z
description: 以持仓量为权重计算价格偏离加权均值的Z-score，持仓量越大时偏离越有回归动力，捕捉大资金博弈下的超买超卖状态
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close'].values
    oi = df['open_interest'].values
    n = len(close)
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)
    lookback = 20
    for i in range(lookback - 1, n):
        window_close = close[i - lookback + 1:i + 1]
        window_oi = oi[i - lookback + 1:i + 1]
        oi_sum = np.sum(window_oi)
        if oi_sum <= 0:
            continue
        w = window_oi / oi_sum
        wmean = np.sum(w * window_close)
        wvar = np.sum(w * (window_close - wmean) ** 2)
        wstd = np.sqrt(wvar)
        if wstd < 1e-9:
            continue
        z = (close[i] - wmean) / wstd
        oi_change_rate = (oi[i] - oi[i - lookback + 1]) / (oi[i - lookback + 1] + 1e-9)
        factor[i] = -z * (1 + np.tanh(oi_change_rate))
    return pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='oi_weighted_mean_revert_z')

name: volume_impulse_decay
description: 衡量成交量脉冲后的衰减速度，捕捉放量冲击后市场吸收流动性的效率——衰减越快说明冲击被快速消化，价格趋势延续概率更高；衰减慢则暗示分歧加剧，反转风险上升
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close'].values
    volume = df['volume'].values
    n = len(close)
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)
    vol_ma20 = pd.Series(volume).rolling(20).mean().values
    vol_std20 = pd.Series(volume).rolling(20).std().values
    price_ret = np.diff(close, prepend=close[0]) / np.where(close == 0, 1, close)
    for i in range(24, n):
        if vol_std20[i] == 0 or np.isnan(vol_std20[i]):
            continue
        vol_z = (volume[i-24:i+1] - vol_ma20[i]) / vol_std20[i]
        impulse_indices = np.where(vol_z[:-1] > 1.5)[0]
        if len(impulse_indices) == 0:
            factor[i] = 0.0
            continue
        last_impulse = impulse_indices[-1]
        bars_since = 24 - last_impulse
        if bars_since < 2:
            factor[i] = 0.0
            continue
        post_vols = volume[i - 24 + last_impulse + 1: i + 1]
        if len(post_vols) < 2:
            factor[i] = 0.0
            continue
        decay_ratios = post_vols / (volume[i - 24 + last_impulse] + 1e-9)
        weights = np.arange(1, len(decay_ratios) + 1, dtype=float)
        weighted_decay = np.sum(decay_ratios * weights) / np.sum(weights)
        impulse_ret = price_ret[i - 24 + last_impulse]
        direction = np.sign(impulse_ret) if impulse_ret != 0 else 1.0
        factor[i] = direction * (1.0 - weighted_decay)
    return pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='volume_impulse_decay')

name: oi_price_divergence_momentum
description: 衡量持仓量变化率动量与价格变化率动量的背离程度，当OI加速增长而价格动量放缓时捕捉多空力量失衡的拐点信号
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    oi = df['open_interest']
    close = df['close']
    oi_ret = oi.pct_change()
    price_ret = close.pct_change()
    fast = 6
    slow = 18
    oi_mom_fast = oi_ret.rolling(fast).mean()
    oi_mom_slow = oi_ret.rolling(slow).mean()
    price_mom_fast = price_ret.rolling(fast).mean()
    price_mom_slow = price_ret.rolling(slow).mean()
    oi_accel = oi_mom_fast - oi_mom_slow
    price_accel = price_mom_fast - price_mom_slow
    oi_std = oi_accel.rolling(slow).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    price_std = price_accel.rolling(slow).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    oi_z = oi_accel / oi_std
    price_z = price_accel / price_std
    divergence = oi_z - price_z
    factor = divergence.rolling(fast).mean()
    factor.name = 'oi_price_divergence_momentum'
    return factor

name: long_cycle_trend_pressure
description: 将长周期（120根K线，约5个交易日）的趋势方向通过线性回归斜率量化，再与短周期（10根K线）价格偏离该趋势线的标准化残差相乘，捕捉长周期趋势对短周期回归压力的映射。
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['close'].values
    n_long = 120
    n_short = 10
    n = len(close)
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)

    for i in range(n_long - 1, n):
        seg = close[i - n_long + 1: i + 1]
        x = np.arange(n_long, dtype=np.float64)
        x_mean = x.mean()
        y_mean = seg.mean()
        slope = np.sum((x - x_mean) * (seg - y_mean)) / (np.sum((x - x_mean) ** 2) + 1e-18)
        intercept = y_mean - slope * x_mean
        trend_val = slope * (n_long - 1) + intercept
        if i >= n_short - 1:
            short_seg = close[i - n_short + 1: i + 1]
            short_mean = short_seg.mean()
            short_std = short_seg.std(ddof=1)
            if short_std > 1e-18:
                residual_z = (close[i] - trend_val) / short_std
            else:
                residual_z = 0.0
            norm_slope = slope / (short_mean + 1e-18)
            factor[i] = -norm_slope * residual_z

    return pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='long_cycle_trend_pressure')

name: shadow_reversal_momentum
description: 计算上下影线长度比的动量变化率，捕捉多空博弈力量的边际转换信号——当上影线占比持续增大说明上方抛压加重，反之下影线占比增大说明下方承接增强
source: 微观结构因子（K线形态、影线分析）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    body = (df['close'] - df['open']).abs()
    upper_shadow = df['high'] - df[['open', 'close']].max(axis=1)
    lower_shadow = df[['open', 'close']].min(axis=1) - df['low']
    total_range = df['high'] - df['low']
    total_range = total_range.replace(0, np.nan)
    upper_ratio = upper_shadow / total_range
    lower_ratio = lower_shadow / total_range
    shadow_bias = (lower_ratio - upper_ratio).fillna(0)
    shadow_bias_ma = shadow_bias.rolling(window=6, min_periods=3).mean()
    shadow_bias_ma_lag = shadow_bias_ma.shift(6)
    factor = shadow_bias_ma - shadow_bias_ma_lag
    factor.name = 'shadow_reversal_momentum'
    return factor

name: oi_weighted_mean_reversion_zscore
description: 用持仓量加权的价格偏离其自适应均线的Z-score，持仓量越大时偏离越可信，捕捉持仓确认下的超买超卖回归机会
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    close = df['close'].copy()
    oi = df['open_interest'].copy()
    lookback = 20
    oi_weight = oi / oi.rolling(lookback, min_periods=1).sum()
    oi_weight = oi_weight.fillna(1.0 / lookback)
    weighted_ma = (close * oi_weight).rolling(lookback, min_periods=5).sum() / oi_weight.rolling(lookback, min_periods=5).sum()
    deviation = close - weighted_ma
    dev_std = deviation.rolling(lookback, min_periods=5).std()
    zscore = deviation / dev_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    oi_pct = oi.pct_change(5)
    oi_confirm = 1 + oi_pct.clip(-0.5, 0.5).fillna(0)
    factor = -zscore * oi_confirm
    factor.name = 'oi_weighted_mean_reversion_zscore'
    return factor

name: shadow_ratio_momentum
description: 计算上下影线占实体比例的动量变化，捕捉多空博弈力量的边际转换——当上影线比例持续增大说明上方抛压加重，下影线比例增大说明下方承接增强，两者差值的动量反映微观结构中多空力量的趋势性变化。
source: 微观结构因子（K线形态、影线分析）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    body = (df['close'] - df['open']).abs()
    upper_shadow = df['high'] - df[['open', 'close']].max(axis=1)
    lower_shadow = df[['open', 'close']].min(axis=1) - df['low']
    full_range = df['high'] - df['low']
    safe_range = full_range.replace(0, np.nan)
    upper_ratio = upper_shadow / safe_range
    lower_ratio = lower_shadow / safe_range
    shadow_diff = lower_ratio - upper_ratio
    n = 6
    factor = shadow_diff.rolling(n).mean() - shadow_diff.rolling(n * 4).mean()
    factor.name = 'shadow_ratio_momentum'
    return factor

name: smart_money_impulse
description: 通过成交量加权的持仓量变化率与价格变化率的非对称响应差异，捕捉主力资金在放量时段隐蔽建仓或出货的方向性冲击信号
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    n = 10
    oi_chg = df['open_interest'].diff()
    price_ret = df['close'].pct_change()
    vol_rank = df['volume'].rolling(n).rank(pct=True)
    heavy_vol = vol_rank > 0.7
    light_vol = vol_rank <= 0.3
    oi_price_prod = oi_chg * price_ret
    heavy_signal = pd.Series(np.where(heavy_vol, oi_price_prod, np.nan), index=df.index)
    light_signal = pd.Series(np.where(light_vol, oi_price_prod, np.nan), index=df.index)
    heavy_ma = heavy_signal.rolling(n, min_periods=3).mean()
    light_ma = light_signal.rolling(n, min_periods=3).mean()
    impulse = heavy_ma.fillna(0) - light_ma.fillna(0)
    vol_std = df['volume'].rolling(n).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = impulse / vol_std
    return factor

name: vol_term_structure_slope
description: 用不同窗口（5、10、20周期）的已实现波动率构建波动率期限结构斜率，捕捉短期波动率相对长期波动率的陡峭程度，斜率为正表示短期波动放大（风险升温），为负表示波动率回归（市场趋于平静）
source: 波动率结构因子（波动率锥、波动率偏斜、Realized Vol）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    log_ret = np.log(df['close'] / df['close'].shift(1))
    rv5 = log_ret.rolling(5).std() * np.sqrt(5)
    rv10 = log_ret.rolling(10).std() * np.sqrt(10)
    rv20 = log_ret.rolling(20).std() * np.sqrt(20)
    x = np.array([5, 10, 20], dtype=float)
    x_dm = x - x.mean()
    denom = (x_dm ** 2).sum()
    slope = rv5 * x_dm[0] + rv10 * x_dm[1] + rv20 * x_dm[2]
    slope = slope / denom
    slope_ma = slope.rolling(10).mean()
    slope_std = slope.rolling(10).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = (slope - slope_ma) / slope_std
    factor.name = 'vol_term_structure_slope'
    return factor

name: oi_price_divergence_persistence
description: 衡量持仓量变化方向与价格变化方向持续背离的累积强度，当OI增加但价格下跌（或OI减少但价格上涨）持续发生时，信号累积增强，捕捉市场中多空分歧加剧后的反转机会。
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close']
    oi = df['open_interest']
    
    # 价格变化率和OI变化率
    price_ret = close.pct_change()
    oi_ret = oi.pct_change()
    
    # 背离信号：OI变化方向与价格变化方向相反时为1，同向时为-1
    # 用符号乘积判断：符号相反则乘积为负
    sign_product = np.sign(price_ret) * np.sign(oi_ret)
    # 背离时sign_product为-1，同向时为+1
    divergence_signal = -sign_product  # 背离为+1，同向为-1
    
    # 用背离幅度加权：取OI变化率和价格变化率的几何平均作为强度
    intensity = np.sqrt(np.abs(price_ret) * np.abs(oi_ret))
    
    # 带符号的背离强度
    signed_divergence = divergence_signal * intensity
    
    # 使用指数加权累积窗口来衡量背离的持续性
    # 短期窗口捕捉近期背离累积
    short_window = 8
    long_window = 24
    
    # 短期背离累积
    short_cum = signed_divergence.ewm(span=short_window, min_periods=4).mean()
    # 长期背离累积
    long_cum = signed_divergence.ewm(span=long_window, min_periods=8).mean()
    
    # 短期相对长期的背离加速度
    divergence_accel = short_cum - long_cum
    
    # 用连续背离的streak长度进一步加权
    is_diverging = (sign_product < 0).astype(float)
    
    # 计算连续背离streak长度
    streak = pd.Series(0.0, index=df.index)
    for i in range(1, len(df)):
        if is_diverging.iloc[i] == 1:
            streak.iloc[i] = streak.iloc[i-1] + 1
        else:
            streak.iloc[i] = 0
    
    # streak的对数权重，避免线性爆炸
    streak_weight = np.log1p(streak)
    
    # 最终因子：背离加速度 × streak权重
    # 当持续背离时信号放大，短暂背离信号较弱
    factor = divergence_accel * (1 + streak_weight)
    
    # 标准化到滚动窗口
    roll_mean = factor.rolling(48, min_periods=12).mean()
    roll_std = factor.rolling(48, min_periods=12).std()
    factor_zscore = (factor - roll_mean) / roll_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    factor_zscore.name = 'oi_price_divergence_persistence'
    return factor_zscore

name: intraday_session_momentum
description: 利用黄金期货日内不同交易时段（早盘、午盘、夜盘）的动量差异构建时段效应因子，捕捉夜盘信息优势带来的价格发现领先效应
source: 季节性因子（月份效应、周内效应、时段效应）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    df = df.copy()
    df['returns'] = df['close'].pct_change()
    
    # 根据30分钟K线的索引位置推断时段
    # SHFE黄金期货交易时段：
    # 夜盘: 21:00-02:30 (约11根30min bar)
    # 早盘: 09:00-11:30 (5根30min bar)
    # 午盘: 13:30-15:00 (3根30min bar)
    # 通过时间戳的小时来判断时段
    
    if hasattr(df.index, 'hour'):
        hours = df.index.hour
    elif 'datetime' in df.columns:
        hours = pd.to_datetime(df['datetime']).dt.hour
    else:
        # 如果没有时间信息，用bar序号模拟日内周期（约19根bar/天）
        bars_per_day = 19
        bar_in_day = np.arange(len(df)) % bars_per_day
        # 前11根视为夜盘，中间5根早盘，最后3根午盘
        session = np.where(bar_in_day < 11, 0, np.where(bar_in_day < 16, 1, 2))
        hours = None
    
    if hours is not None:
        # 夜盘: 21-23, 0-2
        # 早盘: 9-11
        # 午盘: 13-15
        session = np.where((hours >= 21) | (hours <= 2), 0,
                  np.where((hours >= 9) & (hours < 12), 1, 2))
    
    df['session'] = session
    
    # 计算各时段的滚动平均收益率
    night_ret = df['returns'].where(df['session'] == 0, 0.0)
    morning_ret = df['returns'].where(df['session'] == 1, 0.0)
    afternoon_ret = df['returns'].where(df['session'] == 2, 0.0)
    
    window = 19 * 10  # 约10个交易日
    
    night_cum = night_ret.rolling(window=window, min_periods=19).sum()
    morning_cum = morning_ret.rolling(window=window, min_periods=19).sum()
    afternoon_cum = afternoon_ret.rolling(window=window, min_periods=19).sum()
    
    # 夜盘动量相对日盘动量的超额：夜盘通常反映海外信息和机构行为
    # 夜盘动量强于日盘 => 趋势延续信号
    day_cum = morning_cum + afternoon_cum
    
    # 用volume加权标准化
    vol_ratio = df['volume'].rolling(window=window, min_periods=19).std()
    vol_ratio = vol_ratio.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    factor = (night_cum - day_cum) / vol_ratio
    
    # 标准化
    factor_mean = factor.rolling(window=window * 2, min_periods=window).mean()
    factor_std = factor.rolling(window=window * 2, min_periods=window).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = (factor - factor_mean) / factor_std
    
    factor.name = 'intraday_session_momentum'
    return factor

name: smart_money_pressure
description: 通过成交量加权的持仓量变化与价格变动方向的非对称性，识别主力资金在放量时隐蔽建仓或减仓的方向性压力——当放量伴随持仓增加但价格未同向大幅波动时，暗示主力在对手盘中吸筹。
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']
    oi = df['open_interest']
    high = df['high']
    low = df['low']
    
    # 价格变动与持仓变动
    ret = close.pct_change()
    oi_chg = oi.diff()
    
    # 成交量相对强度（相对于近期均值的倍数）
    vol_ma = volume.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean()
    vol_ratio = volume / vol_ma.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 价格波动幅度归一化（用真实波幅衡量当根K线的价格效率）
    true_range = high - low
    tr_ma = true_range.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean()
    price_efficiency = ret.abs() / (true_range / tr_ma.replace(0, np.nan)).replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 核心逻辑：主力压力 = 放量时持仓变化的方向 × 成交量权重 ÷ 价格实际移动效率
    # 当放量+持仓增加但价格移动效率低（振幅大但净变动小），说明主力在震荡中吸筹
    # 符号由持仓变化方向与价格方向的组合决定
    
    # 持仓变化方向与价格方向的交互
    oi_chg_norm = oi_chg / oi.rolling(20, min_periods=5).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 大单信号：放量条件下，持仓变化强但价格效率低（主力隐蔽操作）
    raw_signal = oi_chg_norm * vol_ratio * (1 - price_efficiency.clip(0, 2) / 2)
    
    # 用指数加权累积近期主力压力方向
    window = 12
    weights = np.exp(-np.arange(window)[::-1] / 4.0)
    weights = weights / weights.sum()
    
    def weighted_sum(x):
        v = x.values
        if len(v) < window:
            w = np.exp(-np.arange(len(v))[::-1] / 4.0)
            w = w / w.sum()
            valid = ~np.isnan(v)
            if valid.sum() < 3:
                return np.nan
            return np.nansum(v * w)
        valid = ~np.isnan(v)
        if valid.sum() < 5:
            return np.nan
        return np.nansum(v * weights)
    
    pressure = raw_signal.rolling(window, min_periods=5).apply(weighted_sum, raw=False)
    
    # Z-score标准化
    mu = pressure.rolling(60, min_periods=20).mean()
    sigma = pressure.rolling(60, min_periods=20).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = (pressure - mu) / sigma
    
    factor.name = 'smart_money_pressure'
    return factor

name: vol_price_impact_asymmetry
description: 衡量上涨与下跌时单位成交量对价格冲击效率的不对称性，当下跌时量价冲击效率显著高于上涨时，暗示卖压主导，反之亦然
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    ret = df['close'].pct_change()
    vol = df['volume'].replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 单位成交量的价格冲击：|return| / volume
    price_impact = ret.abs() / vol
    
    # 区分上涨和下跌的price impact
    up_impact = np.where(ret > 0, price_impact, np.nan)
    down_impact = np.where(ret < 0, price_impact, np.nan)
    
    up_impact = pd.Series(up_impact, index=df.index)
    down_impact = pd.Series(down_impact, index=df.index)
    
    window = 20
    
    # 用expanding min_periods方式计算滚动均值，对nan做特殊处理
    up_mean = up_impact.rolling(window=window, min_periods=5).mean()
    down_mean = down_impact.rolling(window=window, min_periods=5).mean()
    
    # 不对称性：(down_impact - up_impact) / (down_impact + up_impact)
    # 正值表示下跌时单位成交量造成更大价格变动（卖压冲击更强）
    asymmetry = (down_mean - up_mean) / (down_mean + up_mean)
    
    # 再用一个较长窗口做z-score标准化，捕捉异常偏离
    long_window = 60
    asym_mean = asymmetry.rolling(window=long_window, min_periods=20).mean()
    asym_std = asymmetry.rolling(window=long_window, min_periods=20).std()
    
    factor = (asymmetry - asym_mean) / asym_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    factor.name = 'vol_price_impact_asymmetry'
    return factor

name: adaptive_zscore_reversion
description: 计算收盘价相对于自适应窗口（由近期波动率调整）加权移动均值的Z-score偏离度，波动率越高则回看窗口越短，捕捉不同市场状态下价格偏离均值后的回归倾向
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values
    high = df['high'].values
    low = df['low'].values
    n = len(close)
    
    # 计算近期实现波动率（用Parkinson估计量，更高效利用高低价信息）
    parkinson_var = np.log(high / low) ** 2 / (4 * np.log(2))
    parkinson_vol = pd.Series(parkinson_var).rolling(window=20, min_periods=10).mean().values
    
    # 将波动率映射到自适应窗口长度：高波动->短窗口(12)，低波动->长窗口(48)
    vol_rank = pd.Series(parkinson_vol).rolling(window=120, min_periods=30).rank(pct=True).values
    # vol_rank in [0,1], 高波动rank高 -> 短窗口
    adaptive_window = np.round(48 - 36 * vol_rank).astype(float)  # range [12, 48]
    adaptive_window = np.where(np.isnan(adaptive_window), 24, adaptive_window)
    adaptive_window = np.clip(adaptive_window, 12, 48).astype(int)
    
    # 对每个bar，用自适应窗口计算EMA均值和标准差，然后算z-score
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)
    
    for i in range(48, n):
        w = adaptive_window[i]
        window_data = close[i - w + 1: i + 1]
        
        # 使用指数加权，最近的权重更大
        alpha = 2.0 / (w + 1)
        weights = np.array([(1 - alpha) ** (w - 1 - j) for j in range(w)])
        weights = weights / weights.sum()
        
        wmean = np.sum(weights * window_data)
        wvar = np.sum(weights * (window_data - wmean) ** 2)
        wstd = np.sqrt(wvar)
        
        if wstd > 1e-10:
            z = (close[i] - wmean) / wstd
            factor[i] = -z  # 取负号：高z表示超买->预期下跌，负z表示超卖->预期上涨
    
    # 用OI变化进行确认调整：超买时若OI也在增加说明趋势可能延续，减弱回归信号
    oi = df['open_interest'].values
    oi_change = pd.Series(oi).pct_change(5).rolling(10, min_periods=5).mean().values
    
    # 当因子与OI变化同向时（都认为要反转），增强信号；反向时衰减
    oi_confirm = np.where(
        np.sign(factor) * np.sign(-oi_change) > 0,
        1.2,  # OI减少+超买 或 OI增加+超卖 -> 增强回归
        0.8   # OI增加+超买（趋势延续可能）-> 衰减回归信号
    )
    
    factor = factor * oi_confirm
    
    result = pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='adaptive_zscore_reversion')
    return result

name: multi_horizon_trend_alignment
description: 将长周期（4小时/8根K线和日线/16根K线）的趋势方向通过斜率归一化后映射到当前30分钟K线，衡量短周期价格偏离长周期趋势锚定值的程度，多周期趋势一致时信号增强
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].copy()
    volume = df['volume'].copy()
    
    # 长周期1: 4小时级别 (8根30分钟K线)
    long_period_1 = 8
    # 长周期2: 日线级别 (16根30分钟K线, 约一个交易日)
    long_period_2 = 16
    # 超长周期: 约2个交易日
    long_period_3 = 32
    
    # 计算各周期的线性回归斜率作为趋势方向
    def rolling_slope(series, window):
        x = np.arange(window, dtype=float)
        x_mean = x.mean()
        x_var = ((x - x_mean) ** 2).sum()
        
        slopes = series.rolling(window).apply(
            lambda y: np.sum((x - x_mean) * (y - y.mean())) / x_var if x_var > 0 else 0,
            raw=True
        )
        return slopes
    
    # 各周期趋势斜率
    slope_4h = rolling_slope(close, long_period_1)
    slope_day = rolling_slope(close, long_period_2)
    slope_2day = rolling_slope(close, long_period_3)
    
    # 用ATR归一化斜率，使不同周期可比
    atr_base = (df['high'] - df['low']).rolling(long_period_2).mean()
    atr_base = atr_base.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    norm_slope_4h = slope_4h * long_period_1 / atr_base
    norm_slope_day = slope_day * long_period_2 / atr_base
    norm_slope_2day = slope_2day * long_period_3 / atr_base
    
    # 长周期趋势一致性：三个周期斜率符号一致时为1，否则衰减
    sign_4h = np.sign(norm_slope_4h)
    sign_day = np.sign(norm_slope_day)
    sign_2day = np.sign(norm_slope_2day)
    
    alignment = (sign_4h + sign_day + sign_2day) / 3.0  # [-1, 1]
    
    # 长周期锚定价格：用日线级别的线性回归预测值
    anchor_price = close.rolling(long_period_2).apply(
        lambda y: np.polyval(np.polyfit(np.arange(len(y)), y, 1), len(y) - 1) if len(y) == long_period_2 else np.nan,
        raw=True
    )
    
    # 短周期相对于锚定价格的偏离（归一化）
    deviation = (close - anchor_price) / atr_base
    
    # 量加权：趋势一致方向上放量确认
    vol_ratio = volume / volume.rolling(long_period_2).mean()
    vol_ratio = vol_ratio.clip(0.5, 3.0)
    
    # 最终因子：趋势一致性 * 符号化偏离方向 * 成交量确认
    # 当多周期一致看涨且价格在锚定上方 -> 强正信号
    # 当多周期一致但价格反向偏离 -> 回归信号（反号）
    factor = alignment * deviation * vol_ratio
    
    # 去极值
    factor = factor.clip(factor.quantile(0.01), factor.quantile(0.99))
    
    factor.name = 'multi_horizon_trend_alignment'
    return factor

name: vol_impulse_price_resistance
description: 衡量成交量脉冲（短期成交量相对长期的突增程度）与价格响应效率的背离，当成交量大幅放量但价格变动迟钝时，暗示市场存在大量对手盘吸收，价格可能反转。
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].copy()
    volume = df['volume'].copy()
    high = df['high'].copy()
    low = df['low'].copy()
    
    # 成交量脉冲：短期均量 / 长期均量的比值，衡量放量程度
    vol_short = volume.rolling(3, min_periods=1).mean()
    vol_long = volume.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean()
    vol_impulse = vol_short / vol_long.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 价格响应效率：绝对价格变动 / 区间范围（真实波幅）
    # 用3根K线窗口的净价格变动 vs 累计真实波幅
    price_net_move = close.diff(3).abs()
    
    # 累计真实波幅（3根K线的TR之和）
    tr = pd.concat([
        high - low,
        (high - close.shift(1)).abs(),
        (low - close.shift(1)).abs()
    ], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    cum_tr = tr.rolling(3, min_periods=1).sum()
    
    price_efficiency = price_net_move / cum_tr.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 核心因子：成交量脉冲与价格效率的背离
    # 高放量 + 低效率 = 正值（吸收信号，反转预期）
    # 高放量 + 高效率 = 负值（趋势延续）
    # 用vol_impulse - 1来中心化放量程度，乘以(1 - price_efficiency)表示价格迟钝度
    vol_excess = vol_impulse - 1.0  # >0 表示放量
    price_resistance = 1.0 - price_efficiency.clip(0, 1)  # 越高说明价格越迟钝
    
    raw_factor = vol_excess * price_resistance
    
    # 加入方向信息：用价格变动方向签名，使因子有方向性
    # 放量滞涨（正价格变动但迟钝）给负号预示回落
    # 放量不跌（负价格变动但迟钝）给正号预示反弹
    price_dir = -np.sign(close.diff(3))  # 反向：滞涨给负号，抗跌给正号
    
    factor = raw_factor * price_dir
    
    # 用EMA平滑降噪
    factor = factor.ewm(span=5, min_periods=3).mean()
    
    # 标准化到滚动窗口
    f_mean = factor.rolling(40, min_periods=10).mean()
    f_std = factor.rolling(40, min_periods=10).std()
    factor = (factor - f_mean) / f_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    factor.name = 'vol_impulse_price_resistance'
    return factor

name: daily_trend_intrabar_alpha
description: 将日线级别的趋势方向（通过多根30分钟K线聚合的日收益率均线）映射到每根30分钟K线上，计算短周期收益率与长周期趋势方向的一致性得分，捕捉顺势延续的alpha。
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].copy()
    volume = df['volume'].copy()
    
    # 30分钟K线，一个交易日约9根(黄金期货日盘+夜盘约4.5小时)
    # 用16根bar近似一个完整交易日，用80根bar近似5个交易日
    bars_per_day = 9
    short_window = bars_per_day  # ~1日
    long_window = bars_per_day * 5  # ~5日
    
    # 长周期趋势：用长窗口的指数加权移动平均斜率表征日线级别趋势
    ema_long = close.ewm(span=long_window, min_periods=long_window // 2).mean()
    ema_short = close.ewm(span=short_window, min_periods=short_window // 2).mean()
    
    # 日线级别趋势强度：短期EMA与长期EMA的偏离度（类似MACD思想）
    trend_signal = (ema_short - ema_long) / ema_long
    
    # 趋势方向的变化率，反映趋势加速/减速
    trend_momentum = trend_signal.diff(bars_per_day)
    
    # 短周期（单根bar）的标准化收益率
    bar_return = close.pct_change()
    bar_return_z = (bar_return - bar_return.rolling(long_window).mean()) / bar_return.rolling(long_window).std()
    
    # 跨周期因子：短周期收益率在长周期趋势方向上的映射
    # 趋势方向一致时放大，不一致时缩小/反转
    # 使用tanh对trend_signal归一化到[-1,1]避免极端值
    trend_direction = np.tanh(trend_signal * 100)  # 放大后压缩
    
    # 核心因子：趋势方向 * 短周期动量一致性 + 趋势加速项
    # 滚动相关：短周期收益与趋势方向的滚动一致性
    consistency = (bar_return_z * trend_direction).rolling(
        window=bars_per_day, min_periods=bars_per_day // 2
    ).mean()
    
    # 加入趋势加速项：趋势正在增强时给予额外权重
    trend_accel = np.tanh(trend_momentum * 500)
    
    # 用成交量加权的趋势确认度
    vol_ma = volume.rolling(long_window, min_periods=long_window // 2).mean()
    vol_ratio = volume / vol_ma.replace(0, np.nan)
    vol_weight = np.tanh(vol_ratio - 1)  # 成交量高于均值为正
    
    # 最终因子：一致性得分 + 趋势加速 * 成交量确认
    factor = consistency + 0.5 * trend_accel * vol_weight
    
    # 去极值
    factor = factor.clip(factor.quantile(0.005), factor.quantile(0.995))
    
    factor.name = 'daily_trend_intrabar_alpha'
    return factor

name: oi_price_divergence_zscore
description: 计算持仓量变化率与价格变化率的滚动背离程度（两者标准化后的差值再取z-score），捕捉持仓量与价格走势不一致时的潜在反转或趋势加速信号
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close']
    oi = df['open_interest']
    
    # 持仓量和价格的短期变化率
    oi_ret = oi.pct_change(1)
    price_ret = close.pct_change(1)
    
    # 在滚动窗口内对两者分别标准化，然后计算差值（背离度）
    window = 48  # 48个30分钟bar ≈ 2个交易日
    
    oi_ret_mean = oi_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=20).mean()
    oi_ret_std = oi_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=20).std()
    price_ret_mean = price_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=20).mean()
    price_ret_std = price_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=20).std()
    
    # 标准化后的变化率
    oi_z = (oi_ret - oi_ret_mean) / (oi_ret_std + 1e-10)
    price_z = (price_ret - price_ret_mean) / (price_ret_std + 1e-10)
    
    # 背离度：OI标准化变化 - 价格标准化变化
    # 正值 = OI增速超过价格增速（增仓但价格未跟上，蓄力或即将反转）
    # 负值 = 价格增速超过OI增速（价格拉升但持仓未跟上，可能虚涨）
    raw_divergence = oi_z - price_z
    
    # 对背离度取累积均值进行平滑，再做z-score以增强信号稳定性
    smooth_window = 24  # 1个交易日
    div_smooth = raw_divergence.rolling(smooth_window, min_periods=10).mean()
    
    # 更长窗口做z-score归一化
    zscore_window = 96  # 4个交易日
    div_mean = div_smooth.rolling(zscore_window, min_periods=40).mean()
    div_std = div_smooth.rolling(zscore_window, min_periods=40).std()
    
    factor = (div_smooth - div_mean) / (div_std + 1e-10)
    
    # clip极端值
    factor = factor.clip(-4, 4)
    
    factor.name = 'oi_price_divergence_zscore'
    return factor

name: oi_squeeze_divergence
description: 衡量持仓量变化率收缩（squeeze）期间价格波动的背离程度——当OI变化率波动收窄但价格波动扩张时，暗示市场即将选择方向突破
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    oi = df['open_interest']
    close = df['close']
    high = df['high']
    low = df['low']
    oi_chg_pct = oi.pct_change().fillna(0)
    oi_chg_vol = oi_chg_pct.rolling(20, min_periods=5).std()
    price_range = (high - low) / close.shift(1).replace(0, np.nan)
    price_range_vol = price_range.rolling(20, min_periods=5).std()
    oi_chg_vol_norm = oi_chg_vol / oi_chg_vol.rolling(60, min_periods=10).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    price_range_vol_norm = price_range_vol / price_range_vol.rolling(60, min_periods=10).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    squeeze_div = (price_range_vol_norm - oi_chg_vol_norm).fillna(0)
    oi_direction = oi_chg_pct.rolling(10, min_periods=3).mean()
    factor = squeeze_div * np.sign(oi_direction)
    factor.name = 'oi_squeeze_divergence'
    return factor

name: big_order_flow_imbalance
description: 通过成交量与持仓量变化的非对称性捕捉主力大单方向——当价格上涨时成交量放大但持仓增加有限，暗示主力主动买入后平仓获利；反之则为主力打压，该因子度量这种资金流不对称强度。
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']
    oi = df['open_interest']

    ret = close.pct_change()
    oi_chg = oi.diff()
    vol_ma = volume.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean()
    vol_ratio = volume / vol_ma.replace(0, np.nan)

    # 主力行为信号：价格方向 × 成交量强度 × 持仓变化方向的背离
    # 大单买入：价格涨 + 放量 + 持仓减少（主力拉升后兑现）
    # 大单卖出：价格跌 + 放量 + 持仓减少（主力砸盘出货）
    # 用符号背离度量主力意图
    oi_chg_norm = oi_chg / oi.rolling(20, min_periods=5).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    signed_flow = ret.apply(np.sign) * vol_ratio * (-oi_chg_norm)

    # 短周期累积捕捉主力连续行为
    flow_fast = signed_flow.rolling(6, min_periods=3).sum()
    flow_slow = signed_flow.rolling(18, min_periods=6).sum()

    # 快慢差值反映主力近期加速行为
    raw = flow_fast - 0.5 * flow_slow

    # z-score 标准化
    mu = raw.rolling(40, min_periods=10).mean()
    sigma = raw.rolling(40, min_periods=10).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    factor = (raw - mu) / sigma

    factor.name = 'big_order_flow_imbalance'
    return factor

name: oi_weighted_mean_reversion_pressure
description: 用持仓量加权的价格偏离度衡量均值回归压力——当价格大幅偏离持仓量加权均价且持仓量收缩时，回归压力更强，反之持仓扩张时趋势可能延续，因子值越极端表示超买超卖程度越高。
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['close'].values
    volume = df['volume'].values
    oi = df['open_interest'].values

    # 持仓量加权的移动均价（20周期）
    window = 20
    oi_abs = np.abs(oi) + 1e-9
    weighted_price = close * oi_abs
    sum_wp = pd.Series(weighted_price).rolling(window, min_periods=5).sum().values
    sum_oi = pd.Series(oi_abs).rolling(window, min_periods=5).sum().values
    oi_vwap = sum_wp / sum_oi

    # 价格偏离持仓量加权均价的百分比
    deviation = (close - oi_vwap) / (oi_vwap + 1e-9)

    # 偏离度的z-score标准化（40周期滚动）
    z_window = 40
    dev_series = pd.Series(deviation)
    dev_mean = dev_series.rolling(z_window, min_periods=10).mean()
    dev_std = dev_series.rolling(z_window, min_periods=10).std()
    zscore = (dev_series - dev_mean) / (dev_std + 1e-9)

    # 持仓量变化率（缩仓放大回归信号，增仓抑制回归信号）
    oi_series = pd.Series(oi_abs)
    oi_ma = oi_series.rolling(window, min_periods=5).mean()
    oi_ratio = oi_series / (oi_ma + 1e-9)
    # oi_ratio < 1 表示缩仓，乘以 (2 - oi_ratio) 放大回归压力
    reversion_multiplier = 2.0 - oi_ratio

    factor = zscore * reversion_multiplier
    factor = factor.values

    return pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='oi_weighted_mean_reversion_pressure')

name: smart_money_flow_divergence
description: 通过比较大成交量K线（主力活跃）与小成交量K线（散户主导）的持仓变化方向差异，捕捉主力资金隐蔽建仓或出货的行为信号
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values
    volume = df['volume'].values
    oi = df['open_interest'].values
    high = df['high'].values
    low = df['low'].values
    
    n = len(close)
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)
    
    lookback = 20
    
    # 持仓变化
    doi = np.diff(oi, prepend=oi[0])
    # 价格变化
    ret = np.diff(close, prepend=close[0]) / np.where(close == 0, 1, np.roll(close, 1))
    ret[0] = 0
    # 振幅（衡量K线信息量）
    amplitude = (high - low) / np.where(close == 0, 1, close)
    
    # 成交量加权的价格冲击 = 单位成交量带来的价格变动，越小说明资金越"聪明"（大单拆单）
    price_impact = np.abs(ret) / (volume + 1e-10)
    
    for i in range(lookback, n):
        window_vol = volume[i - lookback:i]
        window_doi = doi[i - lookback:i]
        window_ret = ret[i - lookback:i]
        window_impact = price_impact[i - lookback:i]
        window_amp = amplitude[i - lookback:i]
        
        # 按成交量分位数区分主力bar和散户bar
        vol_median = np.median(window_vol)
        vol_q75 = np.percentile(window_vol, 75)
        
        big_mask = window_vol >= vol_q75  # 主力活跃的bar
        small_mask = window_vol <= vol_median  # 散户主导的bar
        
        if np.sum(big_mask) < 2 or np.sum(small_mask) < 2:
            continue
        
        # 主力bar：成交量大但价格冲击小 → 隐蔽操作
        # 计算主力bar的持仓变化方向（加权by成交量）
        big_doi = window_doi[big_mask]
        big_vol = window_vol[big_mask]
        big_ret = window_ret[big_mask]
        big_impact = window_impact[big_mask]
        
        # 聪明钱权重：冲击越小、成交量越大 → 权重越高
        smart_weight = big_vol / (big_impact + 1e-10)
        smart_weight = smart_weight / (np.sum(smart_weight) + 1e-10)
        
        # 主力方向 = 持仓变化 × 价格方向的加权信号
        # 如果主力增仓做多：doi>0 且 ret>0 → 正信号
        # 如果主力增仓做空：doi>0 且 ret<0 → 负信号
        smart_signal = np.sum(smart_weight * big_doi * np.sign(big_ret))
        
        # 散户bar的信号（简单均值）
        small_doi = window_doi[small_mask]
        small_ret = window_ret[small_mask]
        retail_signal = np.mean(small_doi * np.sign(small_ret))
        
        # 主力与散户的分歧度：主力信号 - 散户信号
        # 正值：主力看多散户看空（跟随主力做多）
        # 负值：主力看空散户看多（跟随主力做空）
        divergence = smart_signal - retail_signal
        
        # 用振幅标准化
        amp_std = np.std(window_amp) + 1e-10
        factor[i] = divergence / amp_std
    
    # Z-score标准化（滚动）
    factor_series = pd.Series(factor, index=df.index)
    roll_mean = factor_series.rolling(60, min_periods=20).mean()
    roll_std = factor_series.rolling(60, min_periods=20).std()
    factor_series = (factor_series - roll_mean) / (roll_std + 1e-10)
    
    return factor_series

name: price_zscore_adaptive
description: 使用自适应窗口（基于近期波动率regime）计算价格偏离移动均值的z-score，波动率高时缩短窗口加速均值回归信号，波动率低时延长窗口过滤噪音
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].copy()
    high = df['high'].copy()
    low = df['low'].copy()
    
    # 计算真实波幅作为波动率代理
    tr = pd.concat([
        high - low,
        (high - close.shift(1)).abs(),
        (low - close.shift(1)).abs()
    ], axis=1).max(axis=1)
    
    # 短期和长期波动率
    vol_short = tr.rolling(10, min_periods=5).mean()
    vol_long = tr.rolling(60, min_periods=20).mean()
    
    # 波动率比率决定自适应权重: 高波动时偏向短窗口
    vol_ratio = (vol_short / vol_long).clip(0.5, 2.0)
    
    # 两个窗口的均值和标准差
    short_window = 20
    long_window = 80
    
    ma_short = close.rolling(short_window, min_periods=10).mean()
    std_short = close.rolling(short_window, min_periods=10).std()
    ma_long = close.rolling(long_window, min_periods=30).mean()
    std_long = close.rolling(long_window, min_periods=30).std()
    
    # z-score for each window
    z_short = (close - ma_short) / std_short.replace(0, np.nan)
    z_long = (close - ma_long) / std_long.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 自适应混合: vol_ratio高(高波动)时权重偏向短窗口z-score
    # 归一化权重到[0,1], vol_ratio范围[0.5, 2.0] -> w_short范围[0, 1]
    w_short = (vol_ratio - 0.5) / 1.5  # maps [0.5, 2.0] -> [0, 1]
    
    adaptive_z = w_short * z_short + (1 - w_short) * z_long
    
    # 用持仓量变化调整信号强度：持仓量下降时超买超卖信号更可靠（趋势衰竭）
    oi = df['open_interest'].copy()
    oi_change_pct = oi.pct_change(10)
    oi_modifier = 1.0 - oi_change_pct.clip(-0.5, 0.5)  # OI下降时放大信号
    
    # 最终因子：取负号使得超买为负、超卖为正（均值回归方向）
    factor = -adaptive_z * oi_modifier
    
    # 去极值
    factor = factor.clip(factor.quantile(0.01), factor.quantile(0.99))
    
    return factor

name: rv_cone_term_skew
description: 多时间尺度已实现波动率在各自历史分位数上的斜率，捕捉波动率锥的期限结构倾斜方向，正值表示长周期波动率分位偏高（结构性波动率抬升），负值表示短周期波动率突刺（均值回复信号）。
source: 波动率结构因子（波动率锥、波动率偏斜、Realized Vol）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values
    high = df['high'].values
    low = df['low'].values
    n = len(close)
    
    # Use Parkinson volatility for efficiency (high-low based)
    log_hl = np.log(high / np.where(low > 0, low, np.nan))
    log_hl_sq = log_hl ** 2 / (4.0 * np.log(2.0))
    
    # Multiple timescales for realized vol
    windows = [6, 12, 24, 48]
    lookback = 240  # historical lookback for percentile ranking
    
    # Compute rolling realized vol at each timescale
    rv_dict = {}
    for w in windows:
        rv = pd.Series(log_hl_sq).rolling(window=w, min_periods=max(w // 2, 3)).mean().values
        rv = np.sqrt(rv) * np.sqrt(w)  # annualize-like scaling to same units
        rv_dict[w] = rv
    
    # Compute percentile rank of each RV within its own rolling history
    pct_ranks = {}
    for w in windows:
        rv_series = pd.Series(rv_dict[w])
        # Rolling percentile rank
        def rolling_pctrank(s, lb):
            result = np.full(len(s), np.nan)
            vals = s.values
            for i in range(lb, len(vals)):
                window_vals = vals[i - lb:i + 1]
                valid = window_vals[~np.isnan(window_vals)]
                if len(valid) >= 20:
                    result[i] = np.searchsorted(np.sort(valid), vals[i]) / (len(valid) - 1)
            return result
        
        pct_ranks[w] = rolling_pctrank(rv_series, lookback)
    
    # Fit linear slope across timescales (x = log of window size for even spacing)
    x = np.log(np.array(windows, dtype=float))
    x_mean = x.mean()
    x_demean = x - x_mean
    ss_xx = np.sum(x_demean ** 2)
    
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)
    for i in range(n):
        y = np.array([pct_ranks[w][i] for w in windows])
        if np.any(np.isnan(y)):
            continue
        y_mean = y.mean()
        y_demean = y - y_mean
        slope = np.sum(x_demean * y_demean) / ss_xx
        factor[i] = slope
    
    return pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='rv_cone_term_skew')

name: long_cycle_beta_projection
description: 将长周期(120bar)趋势斜率通过滚动Beta投影到短周期(10bar)动量上，衡量短期价格运动对长期趋势的敏感度与方向一致性，高值表示短周期正被长周期趋势驱动
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values.astype(float)
    n = len(close)
    
    # Long cycle trend: linear regression slope over 120 bars, normalized by price
    long_win = 120
    long_slope = np.full(n, np.nan)
    long_r2 = np.full(n, np.nan)
    x = np.arange(long_win, dtype=float)
    x_mean = x.mean()
    x_var = ((x - x_mean) ** 2).sum()
    
    for i in range(long_win - 1, n):
        y = close[i - long_win + 1: i + 1]
        y_mean = y.mean()
        if y_mean == 0:
            continue
        cov_xy = ((x - x_mean) * (y - y_mean)).sum()
        slope = cov_xy / x_var
        long_slope[i] = slope / y_mean * 1000  # normalized slope
        # R-squared as trend strength
        y_hat = y_mean + slope * (x - x_mean)
        ss_res = ((y - y_hat) ** 2).sum()
        ss_tot = ((y - y_mean) ** 2).sum()
        long_r2[i] = 1.0 - ss_res / ss_tot if ss_tot > 1e-12 else 0.0
    
    # Short cycle momentum: 10-bar return normalized by rolling std
    short_win = 10
    short_ret = np.full(n, np.nan)
    for i in range(short_win, n):
        short_ret[i] = (close[i] - close[i - short_win]) / close[i - short_win] if close[i - short_win] != 0 else 0.0
    
    # Rolling beta of short_ret on long_slope over 40-bar window
    beta_win = 40
    beta_arr = np.full(n, np.nan)
    
    for i in range(long_win + beta_win - 1, n):
        ls = long_slope[i - beta_win + 1: i + 1]
        sr = short_ret[i - beta_win + 1: i + 1]
        mask = ~(np.isnan(ls) | np.isnan(sr))
        if mask.sum() < 20:
            continue
        ls_v = ls[mask]
        sr_v = sr[mask]
        ls_mean = ls_v.mean()
        sr_mean = sr_v.mean()
        cov = ((ls_v - ls_mean) * (sr_v - sr_mean)).sum()
        var_ls = ((ls_v - ls_mean) ** 2).sum()
        if var_ls < 1e-12:
            continue
        beta = cov / var_ls
        beta_arr[i] = beta
    
    # Final factor: beta * long_trend_strength(R²) * long_slope direction
    factor = beta_arr * long_r2 * long_slope
    
    # Winsorize at 1%/99%
    factor_s = pd.Series(factor, index=df.index)
    lower = factor_s.quantile(0.01)
    upper = factor_s.quantile(0.99)
    factor_s = factor_s.clip(lower, upper)
    
    return factor_s

name: vol_shock_price_elasticity
description: 衡量价格变动对成交量冲击的弹性（滚动回归斜率），弹性下降意味着大量成交无法推动价格，暗示筹码被吸收，预示反转或趋势衰竭
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close']
    volume = df['volume']
    
    # Rolling volume z-score as "volume shock" measure
    vol_ma = volume.rolling(40, min_periods=20).mean()
    vol_std = volume.rolling(40, min_periods=20).std()
    vol_zscore = (volume - vol_ma) / (vol_std.replace(0, np.nan) + 1e-10)
    
    # Signed return (to capture directional impact)
    ret = close.pct_change()
    abs_ret = ret.abs()
    
    # Rolling beta: abs_ret = alpha + beta * vol_zscore
    # High beta = price is elastic to volume shocks
    # Low/declining beta = volume absorbed without price impact
    window = 24  # 24 bars ~ 2 trading days on 30min
    
    cov_rv = abs_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=12).cov(vol_zscore)
    var_v = vol_zscore.rolling(window, min_periods=12).var()
    elasticity = cov_rv / (var_v.replace(0, np.nan) + 1e-10)
    
    # Rate of change in elasticity: declining = absorption regime
    elas_fast = elasticity.ewm(span=8, min_periods=4).mean()
    elas_slow = elasticity.ewm(span=30, min_periods=10).mean()
    elas_momentum = elas_fast - elas_slow
    
    # Combine with price direction:
    # Falling elasticity + rising price => stealth accumulation (bullish)
    # Falling elasticity + falling price => selling absorbed (bullish reversal)
    # Rising elasticity + rising price => easy gains, fragile (bearish)
    price_direction = close.ewm(span=20, min_periods=10).mean().pct_change(10)
    
    # Core factor: negative elasticity momentum adjusted by price context
    # Negative elas_momentum (absorption) with any price trend => contrarian signal
    factor = -elas_momentum * (1 + abs_ret.rolling(window, min_periods=12).mean() * 100)
    
    # Normalize by recent range for cross-regime stability
    factor_ma = factor.rolling(60, min_periods=20).mean()
    factor_std = factor.rolling(60, min_periods=20).std()
    factor = (factor - factor_ma) / (factor_std.replace(0, np.nan) + 1e-10)
    
    factor.name = 'vol_shock_price_elasticity'
    return factor

name: cross_cycle_trend_residual_momentum
description: 用长周期(48根K线≈3个交易日)线性回归趋势外推的预期价格与实际短周期(8根K线)价格的偏差动量，捕捉短期价格对长期趋势轨迹的超调或滞后信号。
source: 跨周期因子（长周期趋势映射到短周期）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd

    close = df['close'].values
    n = len(close)
    long_window = 48   # ~3 trading days on 30min bars
    short_window = 8   # ~4 hours
    factor = np.full(n, np.nan)

    # Precompute linear regression components for long window
    x = np.arange(long_window, dtype=float)
    x_mean = x.mean()
    x_var = ((x - x_mean) ** 2).sum()

    for i in range(long_window + short_window - 1, n):
        # Long-period linear regression on [i - long_window - short_window + 1, i - short_window + 1)
        lr_start = i - long_window - short_window + 1
        lr_end = i - short_window + 1
        y = close[lr_start:lr_end]

        if np.any(np.isnan(y)):
            continue

        y_mean = y.mean()
        slope = ((x - x_mean) * (y - y_mean)).sum() / x_var
        intercept = y_mean - slope * x_mean

        # Project trend forward by short_window bars
        # At end of LR window, x = long_window - 1; project to x = long_window - 1 + short_window
        projected_price = intercept + slope * (long_window - 1 + short_window)

        # Actual current price
        actual_price = close[i]

        # Price at the end of the LR window (start of short window)
        anchor_price = close[lr_end]

        if anchor_price == 0:
            continue

        # Residual: how much short-term deviates from long-term projection (normalized)
        projected_return = (projected_price - anchor_price) / anchor_price
        actual_return = (actual_price - anchor_price) / anchor_price

        residual = actual_return - projected_return

        # Weight by trend strength (R-squared of the long regression)
        y_hat = intercept + slope * x
        ss_res = ((y - y_hat) ** 2).sum()
        ss_tot = ((y - y_mean) ** 2).sum()
        r_squared = 1.0 - ss_res / ss_tot if ss_tot > 1e-12 else 0.0

        # Strong long-trend makes the residual more meaningful
        factor[i] = residual * r_squared

    factor_series = pd.Series(factor, index=df.index, name='cross_cycle_trend_residual_momentum')

    # Standardize with rolling z-score to stabilize
    roll_mean = factor_series.rolling(96, min_periods=48).mean()
    roll_std = factor_series.rolling(96, min_periods=48).std()
    factor_series = (factor_series - roll_mean) / roll_std.replace(0, np.nan)

    return factor_series

name: weekday_session_return_bias
description: 基于滚动历史统计每个(星期几×日内时段)组合的平均收益率，捕捉黄金因全球交易时段轮转产生的周内×时段交互季节性偏差
source: 季节性因子（月份效应、周内效应、时段效应）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    df = df.copy()
    df['ret'] = df['close'].pct_change()
    
    # Extract weekday and intraday session identifier
    if hasattr(df.index, 'weekday'):
        df['weekday'] = df.index.weekday
        df['session'] = df.index.hour * 100 + df.index.minute
    else:
        df['weekday'] = pd.to_datetime(df.index).weekday
        df['session'] = pd.to_datetime(df.index).hour * 100 + pd.to_datetime(df.index).minute
    
    # Create a composite seasonal key: weekday * 100 + session_rank
    unique_sessions = sorted(df['session'].unique())
    session_map = {s: i for i, s in enumerate(unique_sessions)}
    df['session_rank'] = df['session'].map(session_map)
    df['seasonal_key'] = df['weekday'] * 100 + df['session_rank']
    
    # For each seasonal_key, compute expanding mean of historical returns
    # Use minimum 20 observations to have stable estimate, with exponential weighting
    # to adapt to regime changes
    min_obs = 20
    halflife = 60  # ~60 occurrences of same slot ≈ 12 weeks
    
    factor = pd.Series(np.nan, index=df.index)
    
    for key in df['seasonal_key'].unique():
        mask = df['seasonal_key'] == key
        subset_ret = df.loc[mask, 'ret']
        
        # Exponentially weighted expanding mean (shift to avoid lookahead)
        ewm_mean = subset_ret.shift(1).ewm(halflife=halflife, min_periods=min_obs).mean()
        ewm_std = subset_ret.shift(1).ewm(halflife=halflife, min_periods=min_obs).std()
        
        # Normalize: t-stat like score for stability
        score = ewm_mean / (ewm_std + 1e-10)
        factor.loc[mask] = score.values
    
    # Clip extreme values
    factor = factor.clip(-3, 3)
    
    # Fill initial NaN with 0 (no seasonal bias estimated yet)
    factor = factor.fillna(0.0)
    
    return factor

name: volume_shock_price_elasticity
description: 衡量成交量冲击（相对于近期均量的突变）对价格变动的弹性，即单位成交量异常度所驱动的价格变动幅度，低弹性意味着放量但价格钝化（量价背离），高弹性意味着量价共振，该比值的时序变化可捕捉市场微观结构转换。
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values
    volume = df['volume'].values
    high = df['high'].values
    low = df['low'].values
    n = len(close)
    
    # 成交量冲击度：当前成交量相对于过去20根K线中位数的对数偏离
    vol_median_20 = pd.Series(volume).rolling(20, min_periods=5).median().values
    # 避免除零
    vol_median_20_safe = np.where(vol_median_20 > 0, vol_median_20, np.nan)
    vol_shock = np.log(volume / vol_median_20_safe + 1e-10)
    
    # 价格变动幅度：用真实波幅(TR)标准化的绝对收益率
    prev_close = np.roll(close, 1)
    prev_close[0] = close[0]
    tr = np.maximum(high - low, np.maximum(np.abs(high - prev_close), np.abs(low - prev_close)))
    tr_ma = pd.Series(tr).rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean().values
    tr_ma_safe = np.where(tr_ma > 0, tr_ma, np.nan)
    
    # 价格变动：收盘价变动绝对值 / 平均TR，衡量标准化的价格响应
    price_move = np.abs(close - prev_close) / tr_ma_safe
    
    # 弹性 = 价格响应 / 成交量冲击度（当vol_shock为正时有意义）
    # 为避免极端值，对vol_shock做截断
    vol_shock_clipped = np.clip(vol_shock, 0.1, None)  # 只看放量情形
    
    raw_elasticity = price_move / vol_shock_clipped
    
    # 取滑动窗口的弹性均值，再计算其短期变化率（加速/减速）
    elasticity_series = pd.Series(raw_elasticity)
    elasticity_ma_fast = elasticity_series.rolling(5, min_periods=2).mean()
    elasticity_ma_slow = elasticity_series.rolling(20, min_periods=5).mean()
    
    # 因子：快慢弹性之差，正值表示近期弹性上升（量价共振增强），负值表示弹性下降（量价背离加剧）
    # 再乘以价格方向符号，使因子具有方向性
    price_direction = pd.Series(close - prev_close).rolling(5, min_periods=2).sum()
    direction_sign = np.sign(price_direction)
    
    factor = (elasticity_ma_fast - elasticity_ma_slow) * direction_sign
    
    # 标准化处理：60周期滚动z-score
    factor_ma = factor.rolling(60, min_periods=10).mean()
    factor_std = factor.rolling(60, min_periods=10).std()
    factor_std_safe = factor_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    factor_z = (factor - factor_ma) / factor_std_safe
    factor_z = factor_z.clip(-3, 3)
    
    factor_z.index = df.index
    factor_z.name = 'volume_shock_price_elasticity'
    
    return factor_z

name: oi_flow_imbalance_momentum
description: 通过持仓量变化与成交量的比值衡量主力资金净流入强度，再结合价格方向加权累积，捕捉主力持续建仓或减仓的动量行为
source: 资金流因子（主力行为、大单方向）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    # 价格方向：用close相对于(high+low)/2的位置判断多空方向，避免简单涨跌的噪音
    mid = (df['high'] + df['low']) / 2.0
    price_direction = (df['close'] - mid) / (df['high'] - df['low']).replace(0, np.nan)
    price_direction = price_direction.fillna(0).clip(-1, 1)
    
    # 持仓量变化占成交量的比例：衡量每单位成交中有多少转化为持仓（主力建仓vs投机对冲）
    oi_change = df['open_interest'].diff()
    # 用volume归一化，避免绝对值的量纲问题
    flow_ratio = oi_change / df['volume'].replace(0, np.nan)
    flow_ratio = flow_ratio.fillna(0).clip(-1, 1)
    
    # 有符号资金流：持仓变化方向 × 价格方向 × 流入比率的绝对强度
    # 当价格上涨且持仓增加 -> 主力做多建仓（正信号）
    # 当价格下跌且持仓增加 -> 主力做空建仓（负信号）
    # 当持仓减少 -> 主力平仓，信号减弱
    signed_flow = price_direction * flow_ratio
    
    # 用不同窗口的EMA差值构造动量，捕捉主力行为的加速/减速
    fast_ema = signed_flow.ewm(span=6, min_periods=3).mean()
    slow_ema = signed_flow.ewm(span=24, min_periods=6).mean()
    
    flow_momentum = fast_ema - slow_ema
    
    # 用成交量加权的滚动累积，放大放量时段的主力信号
    vol_weight = df['volume'] / df['volume'].rolling(window=24, min_periods=6).mean().replace(0, np.nan)
    vol_weight = vol_weight.fillna(1.0).clip(0.2, 5.0)
    
    weighted_momentum = flow_momentum * vol_weight
    
    # 滚动标准化，使因子值稳定
    roll_mean = weighted_momentum.rolling(window=48, min_periods=12).mean()
    roll_std = weighted_momentum.rolling(window=48, min_periods=12).std().replace(0, np.nan)
    
    factor = (weighted_momentum - roll_mean) / roll_std
    factor = factor.fillna(0)
    
    return factor

name: adaptive_mean_reversion_zscore
description: 基于自适应窗口（波动率调整）的价格偏离VWAP均值的Z-score，捕捉价格相对于成交量加权公允价值的超买超卖程度，波动率越高则回看窗口越短以适应市场状态变化
source: 均值回归因子（超买超卖、偏离均值）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    typical_price = (df['high'] + df['low'] + df['close']) / 3.0
    
    # 计算滚动波动率用于自适应窗口
    ret = df['close'].pct_change()
    fast_vol = ret.rolling(window=10, min_periods=5).std()
    slow_vol = ret.rolling(window=40, min_periods=10).std()
    
    # 波动率比率：高波动时用短窗口，低波动时用长窗口
    vol_ratio = (fast_vol / slow_vol.replace(0, np.nan)).clip(0.5, 2.0)
    
    # 自适应窗口长度：基础窗口24（约2个交易日），根据波动率比率调整
    base_window = 24
    # vol_ratio高 -> 窗口短（快速适应），vol_ratio低 -> 窗口长（稳定估计）
    adaptive_window = (base_window / vol_ratio).fillna(base_window).astype(int).clip(8, 48)
    
    # 计算多个固定窗口的VWAP和标准差，然后根据自适应窗口插值选择
    windows = [8, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48]
    vwap_dict = {}
    std_dict = {}
    
    for w in windows:
        cum_vp = (typical_price * df['volume']).rolling(window=w, min_periods=w // 2).sum()
        cum_v = df['volume'].rolling(window=w, min_periods=w // 2).sum()
        vwap_dict[w] = cum_vp / cum_v.replace(0, np.nan)
        # 价格偏离VWAP的滚动标准差
        deviation = typical_price - vwap_dict[w]
        std_dict[w] = deviation.rolling(window=w, min_periods=w // 2).std()
    
    # 根据自适应窗口选择最近的VWAP和std
    n = len(df)
    selected_vwap = pd.Series(np.nan, index=df.index)
    selected_std = pd.Series(np.nan, index=df.index)
    
    for i in range(n):
        aw = adaptive_window.iloc[i]
        # 找最近的窗口
        best_w = min(windows, key=lambda w: abs(w - aw))
        selected_vwap.iloc[i] = vwap_dict[best_w].iloc[i]
        selected_std.iloc[i] = std_dict[best_w].iloc[i]
    
    # Z-score: 当前价格偏离自适应VWAP的标准化程度
    deviation = typical_price - selected_vwap
    zscore = deviation / selected_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 加入持仓量权重：持仓量增加时信号更可靠（取反表示均值回归方向）
    oi_change_pct = df['open_interest'].pct_change(5)
    oi_weight = 1.0 + oi_change_pct.clip(-0.1, 0.1) * 5  # 持仓增加放大信号
    
    # 负号：Z-score为正（超买）-> 因子为负（预期回落），反之亦然
    factor = -zscore * oi_weight
    
    factor = factor.replace([np.inf, -np.inf], np.nan)
    factor.name = 'adaptive_mean_reversion_zscore'
    
    return factor

name: oi_price_elastic_divergence
description: 计算持仓量变化率对价格变化率的弹性系数的滚动Z-score，捕捉OI对价格反应的异常偏离——当弹性系数极端偏高说明投机性建仓过度（价格小幅波动引发大量持仓变化），极端偏低则说明市场对价格变动漠然，两者均预示趋势转折。
source: 持仓量衍生因子（OI变化率、OI动量、OI与价格背离）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values.astype(float)
    oi = df['open_interest'].values.astype(float)
    n = len(close)
    
    # 价格收益率和OI变化率
    price_ret = np.empty(n)
    price_ret[0] = 0.0
    price_ret[1:] = (close[1:] - close[:-1]) / close[:-1]
    
    oi_ret = np.empty(n)
    oi_ret[0] = 0.0
    oi_ret[1:] = (oi[1:] - oi[:-1]) / np.where(oi[:-1] == 0, 1.0, oi[:-1])
    
    # 计算滚动弹性系数: 用滚动回归 oi_ret ~ price_ret 的斜率
    # 弹性 = cov(oi_ret, price_ret) / var(price_ret)
    window = 20
    
    price_ret_s = pd.Series(price_ret)
    oi_ret_s = pd.Series(oi_ret)
    
    roll_cov = price_ret_s.rolling(window=window, min_periods=12).apply(
        lambda x: np.cov(x, oi_ret_s.iloc[x.index[0]:x.index[-1]+1].values[-len(x):])[0, 1] 
        if len(x) >= 12 else np.nan, raw=False
    )
    
    # 更高效的方式
    roll_mean_p = price_ret_s.rolling(window=window, min_periods=12).mean()
    roll_mean_o = oi_ret_s.rolling(window=window, min_periods=12).mean()
    
    cross = (price_ret_s * oi_ret_s).rolling(window=window, min_periods=12).mean()
    roll_cov2 = cross - roll_mean_p * roll_mean_o
    
    roll_var_p = price_ret_s.rolling(window=window, min_periods=12).var(ddof=0)
    
    # 弹性系数
    elasticity = roll_cov2 / roll_var_p.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 对弹性系数取滚动Z-score（较长窗口）以衡量当前弹性是否异常
    zscore_window = 60
    elas_mean = elasticity.rolling(window=zscore_window, min_periods=30).mean()
    elas_std = elasticity.rolling(window=zscore_window, min_periods=30).std(ddof=1)
    
    z_elasticity = (elasticity - elas_mean) / elas_std.replace(0, np.nan)
    
    # 用符号调整：结合近期OI方向，使因子有方向性
    # 如果OI在增加且弹性异常高 -> 投机建仓过度，可能反转（负信号）
    # 使用tanh压缩极端值
    oi_momentum = oi_ret_s.rolling(window=10, min_periods=5).mean()
    oi_direction = np.sign(oi_momentum)
    
    # 最终因子：弹性Z-score乘以OI方向的负值 -> 过度建仓为负信号
    factor = -z_elasticity * oi_direction
    
    # clip极端值
    factor = factor.clip(-5, 5)
    
    factor.index = df.index
    factor.name = 'oi_price_elastic_divergence'
    
    return factor

name: volume_price_elasticity_regime
description: 计算成交量变化率与价格变化率的弹性系数在滚动窗口内的regime切换信号，捕捉量价弹性从高弹性（趋势）向低弹性（背离/衰竭）转变的拐点
source: 量价关系因子（成交量异常、量价背离、成交量冲击）
code:
def compute_factor(df):
    import numpy as np
    import pandas as pd
    
    close = df['close'].values
    volume = df['volume'].values
    n = len(close)
    
    # 价格收益率和成交量变化率
    price_ret = np.empty(n)
    price_ret[0] = 0.0
    price_ret[1:] = (close[1:] - close[:-1]) / close[:-1]
    
    vol_ret = np.empty(n)
    vol_ret[0] = 0.0
    vol_ret[1:] = (volume[1:] - volume[:-1]) / (volume[:-1] + 1e-10)
    
    # 滚动窗口计算量价弹性（OLS斜率：vol_ret对abs(price_ret)的回归斜率）
    # 弹性高意味着价格小幅变动伴随成交量大幅变动（正常趋势市场）
    # 弹性突然下降意味着价格变动但量未跟随（量价背离/趋势衰竭）
    
    short_window = 12
    long_window = 48
    
    abs_price_ret = np.abs(price_ret)
    abs_vol_ret = np.abs(vol_ret)
    
    # 用滚动相关性 * (std_vol / std_price) 作为弹性度量
    abs_pr_series = pd.Series(abs_price_ret)
    abs_vr_series = pd.Series(abs_vol_ret)
    
    # 短期弹性
    roll_corr_short = abs_pr_series.rolling(short_window, min_periods=8).corr(abs_vr_series)
    std_vol_short = abs_vr_series.rolling(short_window, min_periods=8).std()
